name: Use of Out-of-range Pointer Offset
description: The product performs pointer arithmetic using an offset that can point outside the intended range of valid memory, enabling attackers to read or write memory locations used elsewhere in the product.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[offset_value] or TRANSFORM[calculated_offset] is used in pointer arithmetic on STORAGE[buffer/structure] without a CONTROL[bounds_check] ensuring the resulting pointer stays within the allocated memory region
